Package recoder.java

Interface TerminalProgramElement

All Superinterfaces:
ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
Abstract, BooleanLiteral, CharLiteral, DoubleLiteral, EmptyMapLiteral, EmptySeqLiteral, EmptySetLiteral, EmptyStatement, ExpressionSVWrapper, ExtendedIdentifier, Final, FloatLiteral, Ghost, Identifier, ImplicitIdentifier, IntLiteral, LabelSVWrapper, Literal, LongLiteral, Model, Modifier, Native, NoState, NullLiteral, ObjectTypeIdentifier, Private, ProgramVariableSVWrapper, Protected, Public, RealLiteral, RKeYMetaConstructExpression, Static, StrictFp, StringLiteral, Synchronized, Transient, TwoState, VisibilityModifier, Volatile
public interface TerminalProgramElement extends ProgramElement
Terminal program element.
